# sage-update

**Sage Update — re-run the installer to update Sage to the latest version**

**Use when:** the user runs `/sage-update`, or asks to update/upgrade Sage.

Thin adapter — the command body lives in **one** place:
**`agents/sage/commands/sage-update.md`**. Read that file and follow it verbatim.
Do not duplicate its steps here; edit the canonical file to change behaviour.
